The People Behind R1SE

Meet our team.

We are college undergraduates who saw a crisis in our community and refused to look away. R1SE was born from the belief that you don't need a degree to make a difference. Just the drive to show up.

Leadership

Tarun Nandakumar

Co-founder

Director of Finance

Oversees R1SE’s financial health, funding strategy, and resource allocation to maximize community impact.

Armaan Vaswani

Co-founder

Director of Research

Leads evidence-based program development and evaluates the effectiveness of R1SE’s initiatives.

Krish Shah

Co-founder

Director of Outreach

Builds relationships with hospitals, clinics, and community organizations to expand R1SE’s reach.

Aaron Mathew

Co-founder

Director of Technology

Drives R1SE’s digital tools, website, and tech-driven solutions to connect people with help faster.

Powered by community.

Want to join us? We are always looking for people to collaborate with or to help our cause, whether as a volunteer, peer coach, partner, or advocate.
